title: Hitting a New High
writer: Robert Harari, Maxwell Shane, Gertrude Purcell
actors: Lily Pons, Jack Oakie, John Howard
plot: Lili Pons and Jack Oakie star as a nightclub singer with aspires to be an opera diva and the met star whom she chases all the way to a safari in Africa to make her dreams come true in this wacky musical comedy.
